strategy: This is a 15,320-health Balance boss with two minions - bring a team with a hitter and support.
Hit Myth, Life, or Death - all take boosted damage. He resists Fire and Ice, so avoid those.
Kill order is the whole fight here. Once Lacombe StrawHouse or Tamworth dies, Berkshire StickHouse spams an AoE every turn.
Leave Berkshire StickHouse for last, or line up an AoE that finishes everything together so his spam never starts.
Stack blades and Feints on your hitter, hold your burst until you can clear the field in one turn, then swing with a Myth, Life, or Death hit.
cheatNotes: Once Lacombe StrawHouse or Tamworth is defeated, Berkshire StickHouse casts an AoE - Sandstorm, Power Nova, or Ra - at the start of every turn. Leave Berkshire for last or kill everything together.
